records.question: What storms named One have a maximum speed of exactly 995 and caused no more than 13 million dollars in damage?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT storm.storm_id FROM storm
JOIN affected_region ON storm.storm_id = affected_region.storm_id
WHERE storm.damage_millions_usd <= 13.0 AND storm.max_speed = 995 AND storm.name = 'One'
records.pred_sql: SELECT storm.Storm_ID FROM storm WHERE Name = 'One' AND Max_speed = 995 AND Damage_millions_USD <= 13
